product: Agent Bricks Supervisor Agent now supports nesting supervisor agents as…
tagline: You can now add another Supervisor Agent as a subagent tool, enabling nested multi agent orchestration.
what_it_does: You can now add another Supervisor Agent as a subagent tool, enabling nested multi agent orchestration. This page describes how to use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks. You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
why_it_matters: You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
